Scaling Mindset Framing



These 3 scaling mindsets generally drive the decisions:



The Beginner

You’ve either never increased spend before, or increased spend with little to no luck

You should follow the moderate scaling path (V-Scale) exclusively and learn the ad account behaviours before scaling fast or trying out the various scaling strategies we cover



The Controller

You have some experience of scaling

You’re keen to balance risk with reward 

You favour stability over scaling in general

You should experiment with V-Scale and then Nitro V-Scale as your confidence grows plus consider experimenting with H-Scale and M-Scale as you learn how to scale, track performance and are confident in reacting to unexpected results



The High Roller

You’ve had experience of scaling in the past

You prefer the rewards of fast scaling

Whilst stability is important you’re under time pressure and need to push faster, or you simply don’t have the patience for slow scaling

You’re more likely to push into M-Scale and H-Scale with a dash of V-Scale Nitro



Read the next sections on the various scaling strategies we deploy within The BPM Method to choose the right one for your ad account and business based on your current and deserved position.
